title: Warp Siphons
description: A Unique, Balanced, and Satisfying take on Fast Travel!
body:
# Warp Siphons

![Warp Siphons Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b782f1801ec377d0d59779ab36c8f577ea329d35.png)

**Warp siphons is a small mod adding 3 items, those being the:**

Warp Siphon

Siphon Core

Pipe (Decorative)

## To set up a Warp Siphon for Fast Travel between two places:

1. Start by placing down 2 Warp Siphons where you want to teleport between.
2. Craft a Siphon core and Shift Right-Click it on the first Siphon
3. Then go and put the linked core inside of the other Siphon

(Repeat step 2 and 3 for the other Siphon if you want to be able to teleport both ways)

 

**Now whenever you shift while on top of a Siphon with a linked core in it, It will teleport you to the Siphon the Core is linked to!**
